# excludeDesktopElements | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

-  excludeDesktopElements 

Type Property# excludeDesktopElements

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var excludeDesktopElements: CGWindowListOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption/excludedesktopelements#Discussion)

Exclude any windows from the list that are elements of the desktop, including the background picture and desktop icons. You may combine this option with the other options.
